theme_and_archetype.mood_and_vibe: Energetic, collective movement, momentum, gathering, structured but bold.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter leading-none uppercase
rules.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight leading-none uppercase

components.cards: border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] bg-white p-6 md:p-8 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all
components.buttons_primary: bg-[#FF5400] text-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-4 px-8 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#FF7333] hover:translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all
components.buttons_secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-4 px-8 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#F4F4F4] transition-all

ui_components.navigation: Sticky nav with solid white bg, sharp 2px bottom border. Large typography for links.
ui_components.vpp_card: Uses bento-style segmentation inside. Shows product image top, then deep divider, then live stats (current/threshold). State badge must be highly visible.
ui_components.progress_bar: Thick 2px borders, sharply rectangular. Fill color corresponds to VPP state.
ui_components.alerts_toasts: Brutalist blocky toasts (Sonner). High contrast, black borders.
ui_components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Bold) for high contrast and modern structural feel.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard translations (no soft floating). Use sharp drop-shadow shifting (e.g. shadow goes from 4px to 2px, box translates down 2px).
motion_and_interactions.vpp_powered_celebration: When hitting POWERED threshold, trigger Confetti or scale-bounce animation. Color flash from yellow to Klein Blue.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee with large uppercase outline text for 'POWER THE PARTY • LOCK THE PRICE' across section breaks.
motion_and_interactions.loading: ASCII or blocky terminal loaders for a slightly raw, technical feel.

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D rendering of dynamic energy streams and particles merging into a solid shape, representing collective power.
hero_background.usage: Use in the main landing page hero section, either as background with overlay or as a prominent side visual.

community_energy.description: Excited crowd cheering, conveying momentum and collective action.
community_energy.usage: Use in 'How it Works' or 'Join the Party' sections to emphasize community power.

product_tires.usage: Use as a thumbnail for a sample 'Tyres' VPP.

product_earphones.usage: Use as a thumbnail for a sample 'Earphones' VPP.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the font pairing: Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and Satoshi for Body. DO NOT use Inter or Space Grotesk.
Implement the brutalist/Swiss shadow style (solid black offsets like shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]) on all cards and main buttons to reinforce the energetic, heavy, and locked-in feel.
Ensure the VPP states (SEED, ACTIVE, ALMOST POWERED, POWERED, LOCKED, EXECUTING, COMPLETED) use the precise color mapping provided.
Do not use generic Shadcn cards out of the box. Heavily customize them to use `rounded-none`, thick borders (`border-2 border-[#0A0A0A]`), and solid shadows.
Use data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based) on all interactive elements.
For the Landing page hero, do not use a standard gradient. Use the generated abstract 3D image url or a bold typographic kinetic marquee to set the 'movement' tone.
Payment routing / checkout components should feature high contrast and clearly display the payment method discount.
In dashboards, prioritize pure data clarity over visual flair (Control Room Grid). Use tight spacing (`p-4` or `p-6`) compared to the marketing pages.
NEVER use placeholder domains for images (e.g. via.placeholder.com). ONLY use the image URLs provided in this file.
Integrate Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) instead of standard Lucide icons where possible for a bolder look.
